params.name: The Barque of Dante
params.description:
On Jul 24, 1822 AD, Delacroix created the oil painting The Barque of Dante.
This oil painting is a masterpiece of the Romantic painter Delacroix. Its content is based on the Divine Comedy, depicting the scene of Virgil leading the poet Dante across the river Styx in a small boat, where the souls of the dead crowded around them. The painting, using Romantic techniques, depicts people tortured by passion and death threats, making the painting a landmark of the Romantic movement.
